prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `d492a647`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 task package for `d492a647` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d492a647/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d492a647/verifier.py#L1), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d492a647/generator.py#L1), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d492a647/notes.md#L1). The rule is: find the lone non-`0/5` seed cell, then recolor every black `0` whose row parity and column parity both match that seed. No new primitive was needed.

I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint and discarded the `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` hint; that mismatch is documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d492a647/notes.md#L1). The generator matches the task family by building a large zero-filled interior inside a noisy `0/5` field, placing one seed inside that interior, and forcing the output to include same-phase recoloring both inside the main zero block and at a few outer-border zeros, which is what the official examples do.

Validation passed end-to-end:
- `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task d492a647`: `3/3` official examples passed
- `python -m arc2.shared.build --task d492a647 --n-examples 1000`: built successfully
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task d492a647`: `1000/1000` generated examples passed

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d492a647/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d492a647/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d492a647/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d492a647/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d492a647/previews/preview_03.png).
